channel.title: Scholar2Podcast
channel.description: A private podcast of lectures from Scholar.
channel.itunes:author: Scholar2Podcast

item.title: The Bible, Theology, and the Christ Figures in Film Session 1: Film Theory Part 1
item.description: Dr. Lewis explains film as art and how it can shpe our opinions.
item.content:encoded: Dr. Lewis explains film as art and how it can shpe our opinions.
item.itunes:author: Lewis, David

item.title: The Bible, Theology, and the Christ Figures in Film Session 4: Christ - Figure Films Part 2
item.description: Dr. Lewis discusses the mind of Christ in movies such as "Angel and the Badman" and "It's a Womderful Life".
item.content:encoded: Dr. Lewis discusses the mind of Christ in movies such as "Angel and the Badman" and "It's a Womderful Life".
item.itunes:author: Lewis, David
